metadata.normalization_rule: effective question plus minimal lineage, evidence IDs, point bindings, option links, evidence locators, and mechanical risk flags
metadata.evidence_policy: RAG source text is not embedded; packets carry locators and reviewers must read E:/chemistry-rag/data/rag_ready directly
metadata.chunk_id_policy: inherited chunk ids are untrusted locator candidates until manually compared with RAG text

evidence_lookup.policy: locator_only; canonical RAG text is not embedded in this packet
evidence_lookup.chunk_id_policy: metadata chunk ids are inherited claims, not trusted evidence; reviewers must compare the RAG text against the question stem/options/answer/explanation and replace or remove wrong ids

rag_exact_id_presence.meaning: id presence only; this does not validate semantic relevance

questions.stem: 在《19-8-03 Sb(OH)₃ 的生成与性质》实验中，生成 Sb(OH)₃ 时常用的锑(III)盐是哪一种？
questions.explanation: 实验资料列出 SbCl₃ + NaOH。

option_links.label: A
option_links.diagnostic_note: “Bi(NO₃)₃”会把试剂、现象或结论方向混到本题中；按本实验点位不能推出该选项。

option_links.label: B
option_links.diagnostic_note: “CuSO₄”会把试剂、现象或结论方向混到本题中；按本实验点位不能推出该选项。

option_links.label: C
option_links.diagnostic_note: 该选项直接对应本题考查的实验操作、现象或结论。

option_links.label: D
option_links.diagnostic_note: “KNO₃”会把试剂、现象或结论方向混到本题中；按本实验点位不能推出该选项。

source_audit.reviewer_note: polished final：已按有效版本复核 canonical 实验步骤、点位绑定和机器判分确定性。 本题的颜色/产物/价态/酸碱或氧化还原判断依赖 supporting theory：textbook_prose_00596_462a4c7dff（As/Sb/Bi 氢氧化物酸碱性和还原性趋势）。 绑定点位：SbCl₃ + NaOH。

option_links.label: A
option_links.diagnostic_note: “KSCN”借用了Fe³⁺/KSCN 血红色检验的线索，和本题绑定点位不一致。

option_links.label: B

option_links.label: C
option_links.diagnostic_note: “AgNO₃”借用了ds 区银盐沉淀的线索，和本题绑定点位不一致。

option_links.label: D
option_links.diagnostic_note: 该选项直接对应本题考查的实验操作、现象或结论。
